shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "downshift useCombobox getItemProps onMouseDown focus flicker preventDownshiftDefault" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && printf '\\n--- item tests ---\\n' && sed -n '1,320p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && printf '\\n--- handler utility ---\\n' && sed -n '1,180p' src/__tests__/utils.call-all-event-handlers.js && rg -n \"preventDownshiftDefault|onMouseDown\" src/hooks/useCombobox src/hooks/useSelect src/hooks/utils.js src/utils.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '240,560p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && sed -n '70,120p' src/utils.js && sed -n '1,220p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js && rg -n \"onMouseDown\" src --glob '*.js' | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc "git log --oneline --all -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | head -20 && git remote -v && sed -n '860,980p' src/downshift.js && sed -n '280,390p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js"
/bin/bash -lc 'npx kcd-scripts test --no-watch src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__ && git diff --check && git status --short'
